---
title: "Site Map"
---

This page orients the reader to every page on the site and shows how each maps
to the Project Proposal requirements.

## Navigation Structure

```text
Absent from Chronic
│
├── 🏠 Index                                        COMPOSED  ← authored landing (README, CACHE Manifest, mission)
│
├── Project
│   └── Project Proposal                            ADAPTED   ← stats_instructions_v3.md
│
├── Pipeline
│   ├── Pipeline Guide                              ADAPTED   ← manipulation/pipeline.md
│   ├── CACHE Manifest                              VERBATIM  ← CACHE-manifest.md
│   └── INPUT Manifest                              VERBATIM  ← INPUT-manifest.md
│
├── Data Primer
│   ├── Variable Inclusion                          VERBATIM  ← variable-inclusion.qmd
│   └── Univariate Distributions                    REDIRECT  → univariate-distributions.html
│
├── Analysis
│   ├── Outcome (LOP Day Decomposition)             REDIRECT  → eda-5.html
│   ├── Outcome (Distribution Shapes)               REDIRECT  → eda-71.html
│   ├── Exposure (Chronic Conditions)               REDIRECT  → eda-61.html
│   ├── Predisposing (Socio-demographic)            REDIRECT  → eda-62.html
│   ├── Facilitating (Health System & Behaviours)   REDIRECT  → eda-63.html
│   ├── Needs (Perceived Health & Limitations)      REDIRECT  → eda-64.html
│   └── Missingness                                 REDIRECT  → eda-65.html
│
└── Site Map                                        COMPOSED  ← contract navigation
```

The index page appears first, marked with 🏠, and is the site landing page.

## Content Type

| Output Type | Produced by Protocol | Meaning and Notes |
|-------------|----------------------|-------------------|
| **VERBATIM** | Direct Line (VERBATIM) | Source document reproduced exactly; only YAML frontmatter was added so Quarto can render it as a site page. Content is byte-for-byte the analyst's original. |
| **REDIRECT** | Direct Line (REDIRECTED) | A short transit page that forwards the browser to a standalone rendered HTML report. The full report is displayed as the analyst produced it. |
| **ADAPTED** | Technical Bridge | Source document carried into the site with non-editorial transforms — frontmatter added, developer-only commands and private paths removed, mermaid diagram injected, internal links neutralized. Meaning preserved. |
| **COMPOSED** | Narrative Bridge | Authored for the site by synthesizing one or more sources; every factual claim is grounded in a named repository source. |

## Proposal Coverage

| Page | Project Proposal section(s) | Coverage status |
|------|-----------------------------|-----------------|
| [Project Proposal](project/project-proposal.html) | §1–§6 (entire proposal) | The source-of-truth requirements document: background, data source, sample construction, outcome definition, analytic plan, and deliverables. |
| [Pipeline Guide](pipeline/pipeline-guide.html) | §2.2, §3.1, §3.2 | Documents variable extraction and cross-cycle harmonization, the ordered sample-exclusion lane, and the pooling weight adjustment (`wts_m / 2`). |
| [CACHE Manifest](pipeline/cache-manifest.html) | §2.2, §3.1, §4.1, §4.2 | Describes the analysis-ready dataset: variable inventory, the sample-flow table (126,431 → 63,843), outcome construction, and observed distribution statistics (mean 1.35, 70.5% zeros). |
| [INPUT Manifest](pipeline/input-manifest.html) | §2.1 | Describes the two raw CCHS PUMF cycles that feed the pipeline. |
| [Variable Inclusion](data-primer/variable-inclusion.html) | §2.2, §3.1 | Traceability record mapping each §2.2 requested variable to its Ellis implementation, plus the CONSORT-style sample-construction flowchart. |
| [Univariate Distributions](data-primer/univariate.html) | §4.2, §5.2 | Univariate distribution of every study variable, supporting outcome distribution checks and the Table 1 descriptive requirement. |
| [Outcome (LOP Day Decomposition)](analysis/outcome-decomposition.html) | §4.1 | Decomposes total LOP days into the eight component reasons that define the outcome variable. |
| [Outcome (Distribution Shapes)](analysis/outcome-shapes.html) | §4.2 | Examines outcome distribution shape, zero-inflation, and overdispersion diagnostics. |
| [Exposure (Chronic Conditions)](analysis/exposure.html) | §2.2 (primary exposure) | Profiles the chronic-condition indicators used as the primary exposure. |
| [Predisposing (Socio-demographic)](analysis/predisposing.html) | §2.2 (predisposing) | Profiles the predisposing socio-demographic predictors (age, sex, marital status, education, immigration, etc.). |
| [Facilitating (Health System & Behaviours)](analysis/facilitating.html) | §2.2 (facilitating) | Profiles the facilitating predictors (income, province, family doctor, work schedule, health behaviours). |
| [Needs (Perceived Health & Limitations)](analysis/needs.html) | §2.2 (needs) | Profiles the needs predictors (self-perceived health, functional limitations, injury status). |
| [Missingness](analysis/missingness.html) | §5.1 | Reviews the missing-data pattern across predictors, supporting the missing-data handling plan. |
